title: Dr. Strange Portal
result_description: A Dr. Strange-style sparking portal appears beside you via blended stock footage; an optional self-cutout lets you step through it.

inputs.name: action_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off shot: stand in farther from the frame edge (mark the spot with a card) leaving open space on one side for the portal, then run in and perform your action.

capture_requirements.framing: leave open space on one side for the portal
capture_requirements.note: do not cross paths with where the portal will sit

inputs.name: portal_stock
inputs.what_to_film: Source a Dr. Strange-style portal stock-footage clip (sparks on a dark/black background).

params.note: trim the front and tail; start on a piece of action to hook the viewer
drop the portal onto an overlay track and slide it to the open side of frame
Filter / Screen / Lighten all work; Screen or Filter read most realistic
position/scale the portal to feel grounded in the distance and not overlapping the body
slide the portal so its timing matches the action; align both clips to end together
(advanced step-through) copy the footage above the portal so layers are 0=footage, 1=portal, 2=self-cutout

edit_steps.note: cut yourself out so you appear in front of the portal
fix layer order so the cutout sits on top

params.note: add electricity/spark SFX, lowered to about -5 to -8 dB

result.description: A sparking portal appears in frame and blends naturally; optionally you step through your own cutout.
success_criteria: Portal blends with no visible black box
Portal does not overlap the body (or cutout sits cleanly on top)
Spark SFX synced to the portal
